---
title: "Poor Bird Guide"
format: 
  html:
    css: birds/bird-styles.css
image: "birds/bird_guide_logo.jpg"
listing:
  contents: birds
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
---

### Welcome to the poor bird guide!
Check out this map of where each bird was found. Click on the points learn more or browse below!

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
library(leaflet)

leaflet() |>
  addTiles() |>
  addMarkers(
    lng = -119.8738, lat = 34.4208,
    popup = "<a href='../birds/northern-shoveler/'>Northern Shoveler</a><br><img src='../birds/northern-shoveler/northern-shoveler.png' width='100px'>",
    label = "Northern Shoveler"
  ) |>
  addMarkers(
    lng = -119.8741, lat = 34.4177, 
    popup = "<a href='../birds/great-blue-heron/'>Great Blue Heron</a><br><img src='../birds/great-blue-heron/great-blue-heron-1.JPG' width='100px'>",
    label = "Great Blue Heron"
  ) |>
  addMarkers(
    lng = -119.8732, lat = 34.4210,
    popup = "<a href='../birds/canada-goose/'>Canada Goose</a><br><img src='../birds/canada-goose/canada-goose.png' width='100px'>",
    label = "Canada Goose"
  )
```

<hr style="margin: 40px 0; border: none; border-top: 1px solid #ddd;">

### Posts
